issues.description: First effect structure is incorrect. 'When Attacking' should trigger OnAttack with a single action: FlipLife (add 1 from Life cards to hand). The PowerBoost is conditional on the FlipLife happening and should be a thenAction, not a separate action at the same level.
Second effect (trigger: 'Trigger') is completely extraneous and has no basis in card text. No card text mentions trashing from hand or playing self. This effect should be removed entirely.

FlipLife action is present but the card says 'add 1 card from top or bottom of Life cards to hand' — this is correct use of FlipLife. However, the PowerBoost should be conditional (thenAction) on performing the FlipLife, not a separate action.
